final:
module RefModule (
        input clk,
        input reset,
        output reg [4:0] ring);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset)
        ring <= 5'b00001;
    else
        ring <= {ring[3:0], ring[4]};
end

endmodule
